name: 이수진

appearance_en.face_shape: clean oval face, defined moderate jaw, flat cheekbones, symmetrical and composed — a face built for authority rather than warmth
appearance_en.skin: fair Korean skin with cool slightly rosy undertone, visibly well-maintained, smooth fine texture, minimal makeup — foundation and subtle lip, nothing decorative
appearance_en.eyes: double eyelid, dark brown iris, slightly upturned outer corners, direct unwavering gaze, crow's feet just beginning at outer corners — early signs of a life spent concentrating
appearance_en.nose: straight medium nose, clean narrow bridge, neat rounded tip
appearance_en.mouth: well-defined upper lip, balanced fullness, resting expression controlled neutral — the mouth of someone who chooses words carefully before speaking
appearance_en.eyebrows: precisely groomed arched dark brows, consistent shape — reflect competence not vanity. Single horizontal line forms when processing information
appearance_en.distinctive_marks: subtle fine lines at outer eye corners, tension line at jaw hinge when stressed, no moles or scars
appearance_en.hair: dark brown hair, medium length to shoulder, fine texture, in low tight bun at work — secured completely, no loose strands. When undone falls straight with slight wave

body.proportions: slim even frame, shoulders level and square, long neck, legs slightly longer proportionally, no excess softness
body.posture: consistently upright, weight evenly centered, neither aggressive nor defensive — the posture of trained conscious self-control
body.body_prompt: 165cm slim even-framed Korean woman, square level shoulders, long neck, deliberate perfectly upright posture

default.description: crisp white or pale grey blouse, dark navy or charcoal fitted cardigan, straight-cut dark trousers, low practical heels or flats
default.wardrobe_prompt: crisp white blouse, dark navy charcoal fitted cardigan, straight-cut dark tailored trousers, low practical block heels

casual.description: simple pale knit or cotton top, straight mid-length skirt, minimal accessories, structured small bag
casual.wardrobe_prompt: simple pale knit or cotton top, straight mid-length skirt, small structured bag, no heavy accessories

stressed.description: same work clothing but slightly less precise — hair half-down, jaw tight, one button undone
stressed.wardrobe_prompt: same work blouse and trousers but slightly less precise, hair half-released from bun, one collar button undone

appearance_en.emotion_baseline: composed default expression — not cold, but controlled. Takes in a room before committing to any reaction
appearance_en.fal_identity_prompt: clean oval-faced Korean woman early-to-mid 50s, direct upturned dark eyes with fine outer corner lines, precisely arched brows, straight nose, controlled neutral mouth, dark brown hair in low tight bun, 165cm slim square-shouldered upright posture, long neck, fair cool-tone Korean skin, quiet watchful authority

style_prompt: photorealistic, ordinary Korean woman you would encounter in a government office, no beauty filter, no skin retouching, realistic skin texture with natural lines and pores, visible early aging at eye corners, 50mm f1.8 lens, cool daylight office interior, street-cast everyday appearance, cinematic restraint
negative_prompt: illustration, anime, cartoon, 3d render, ugly, deformed, extra fingers, glamorous, heavy makeup, idol look, beauty filter, airbrushed skin, perfect complexion, smooth flawless skin, model look, celebrity appearance, skin retouching, excessive youth
